subject: ap-calculus-bc
title: Rate & Accumulation (Riemann Sums)
stimulus:
Hot water is dripping through a coffeemaker, filling a large cup with coffee. The amount of coffee in the cup at
time t, 0 (cid:133) t (cid:133) 6, is given by a differentiable function C, where t is measured in minutes. Selected values of
C(cid:11)t(cid:12), measured in ounces, are given in the table above.

parts.prompt:
Use the data in the table to approximate C(cid:132)(cid:11)3.5(cid:12). Show the computations that lead to your answer, and
indicate units of measure.

scoring_points.description: Correct g-values using area from graph

parts.prompt: Is there a time t, 2 (cid:133) t (cid:133) 4, at which C(cid:132)(cid:11)t(cid:12) (cid:32) 2? Justify your answer.

required_elements: Type of extremum with sign analysis

parts.prompt:

problem.
